articles.title: A Peaceful Mountain Town in Western Canada Is Shaken by Deadly Shooting
articles.abstract: Tumbler Ridge sits at the foothills of the Rocky Mountains in northeastern British Columbia, and is surrounded by expansive mountain ranges and a geological park.
articles.byline: By Vjosa Isai and Yan Zhuang

articles.abstract: Police say the suspected shooter died of a self-inflicted injury after the shooting in Tumbler Ridge, a remote community.
articles.byline: By Francesca Regalado

articles.title: Guatemala to Phase Out Use of Cuban Doctors Amid U.S. Pressure
articles.abstract: The program, nearly 30 years old, had allowed Cuban medical workers to fill critical needs in Guatemala, while reaping income for Cuba.
